chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: customer, items, payment status, delivery information

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.predicate: can be cancelled if not yet shipped

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Unit price
triplets.object: does not change with future price updates

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

entities_post_resolution.name: Active/Inactive Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: A binary attribute indicating whether an entity is currently active or inactive.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED | - Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master(Cust Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: The CUST_ID column in the CUSTOMER_MASTER table, serving as the primary identifier for a customer in the customer master data.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)
 | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer is an individual or entity registered on the platform who engages in transactions (e.g., makes purchases) and may receive refunds on orders.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | # Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the

entities_post_resolution.name: Line 1
entities_post_resolution.definition: Line 1 represents a purchase item for Wireless Headphones in the electronics accessories domain.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | - Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is the unit of an order that references a single product and the quantity ordered.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - References exactly one Product | - Quantity of units ordered | - Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | - Extended amount = quantity × unit price | - Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | - Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50 | - A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item.Product Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The ORDER_LINE_ITEM entity represents a line item within a Sales Order, detailing the product, quantity, and unit price for that line.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)
 | | Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amou

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Payment is the business entity representing a financial transaction associated with a Sales Order, identified by PAYMENT_ID, recording the payment amount and linking to the corresponding Sales Order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- References exactly one Sales Order | - Payment amount | - Confirmation timestamp | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | - A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: Sales Order Header: the database table storing high-level information for each sales order, including a customer identifier (CUST_ID) that links to the Customer Master.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment represents a delivery transaction for a Sales Order, uniquely identified by SHIPMENT_ID, containing tracking details, and whereby a Sales Order may have one or more Shipments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- References exactly one Sales Order | - Tracking number | - Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Product.Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The CATEGORY_ID column in the TB_PRODUCT table, acting as a foreign key that links a product to its category in TB_CATEGORY.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: The price charged for a single unit of a product or service, used to calculate total cost; it can be fixed over time or observed at the time of an order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates | - Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: A policy outlining the conditions under which customers can return products and receive refunds.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

entities_post_resolution.name: Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition:
TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree.

**Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | | Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO |
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree.

**Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | | Column | Type | Description | Nullable |

| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO |

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, regional affiliation, account status, and the date the record was created.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores product information including identifiers, pricing, category association, and active status for the product catalog.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical category data for products, including each category's identifier, name, and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores the header information for customer orders, including identifiers, dates, totals, status, payment confirmation, delivery event, and creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores line item details for each order, including the product, quantity, unit price, and total line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for creation and confirmation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments associated with orders, including tracking details, shipment timing, and current status.
